name: Fat-free, Gluten Free Enchilada Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all dry ingredients together in a bowl.
2. Gradually add the dry mixture to 1 quart of cold water in a deep saucepan.
3. Stir constantly over medium heat until the mixture thickens and simmers.
4. Use the sauce over enchiladas or to season grain dishes.
SUGGESTIONS: Refrigerate extra sauce. Double or triple the dry ingredients as needed. Store the dry mix in a tightly closed jar. For sauce, use 3/4 cup of the dry mix with one quart of cold water.
